_note: EARTHONE channel-level branding — applied by pipeline/publish/update-channel-branding.mjs (channels.update + channelBanners.insert). This crime-cartography project owns the crime playlist(s) only; channel-level assets are set up here as the first project and inherited by future per-playlist projects.
description:
EARTH ONE — the numbers, mapped.

Data stories built from public records, produced end-to-end by an AI. Every figure on screen is real, sourced, and reproducible — the complete pipeline, data, and decision record are public: https://github.com/hadi-nayebi/crime-cartography

First series: US Cities · Crime, Mapped — how reported crime rose and fell across four decades in America's cities, neighborhood by neighborhood, built from FBI records and each city's own open data. Honest by construction: measurement changes are explained on screen, data gaps stay gaps, and nothing is dramatized.

More series on other public-data topics will join as the channel grows. If you find an error, say so — corrections are part of the record.
keywords: "data visualization" "crime statistics" "crime map" "open data" "FBI UCR" "data journalism" maps cities "reproducible research"
